description_long: This bungalow features a wide, wraparound porch with white railings and brown wooden steps leading up to the main entrance. The roof is a prominent, multi-tiered gable style with a large central dormer, and the exterior walls are clad in light-colored siding. The front facade includes a centered door flanked by windows, while the upper dormer has two shuttered windows. The structure sits elevated above the ground, with the porch extending around at least three sides. The rear view shows a single window in the dormer and a large open area beneath the porch roof. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional American Craftsman bungalows, emphasizing horizontal lines and a welcoming, homey appearance.
description: A classic bungalow with a wide wraparound porch, multi-tiered gable roof, and prominent dormer windows, finished in light siding and brown roofing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide steps, wraparound porch, and two shuttered dormer windows above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the porch, the extended gable roof, and the solid side wall with no visible windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single dormer window, open porch area, and no visible entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch's continuation and a single window on the side wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with single dormer window at rear
